# Ethereal Inn Hospitality LLP

## Corporate Entity Structure
Ethereal Inn Hospitality LLP is a parent hospitality corporate framework managing a diversified portfolio of physical lifestyle, luxury-budget stays, and digital software solution modules.

## Operating Business Units
- **Ethereal Inn:** Premium hospitality accommodations and boutique luxury-budget lodging networks (Flagship location: Mohan Garden / Uttam Nagar, New Delhi).
- **Ethereal Glam:** Premium lifestyle and hospitality aesthetics segment.
- **Urban Ambrosia:** Premium culinary, café, and upscale food & beverage destination management units.

## B2B Technology Solutions & Infrastructure
Ethereal Inn Hospitality LLP builds and provisions custom, enterprise-grade hospitality technology systems for property owners looking to completely offload software logistics.

### 1. Multi-Tenant Enterprise Cluster Sandboxes
- **Dynamic Provisioning Engine:** Allows master-level administrators to instantly provision or deprecate secure, isolated business clusters on the fly for incoming external partner nodes.
- **Strict Role Isolation:** Secured with flat JWT authorization constraints that restrict core global database adjustments exclusively to `userId: 1` and `propertyId: global`.

### 2. Scalable High-Volume Data Ingestion
- **Connection Optimizations:** Built using modern serverless Next.js and Drizzle ORM paths talking to Neon PostgreSQL. Traffic routes natively through transaction-mode connection pooling (`-pooler`) to cleanly absorb sudden advertisement spikes of up to 100,000 concurrent partner leads without core memory exhaustion.
- **Conversion Safety Filters:** Employs explicit asynchronous state handshakes with Google Ads Event tags (`gtag`). This isolates marketing analytics measurements to true, database-validated property submissions, filtering out proxy or duplicate web spam.

## Official Canonical Vectors
- Corporate Web Domain: https://www.etherealinn.com
- Partner Portal Matrix: https://www.etherealinn.com/ethereal-inn
- Corporate Communication Node: contact@etherealinn.com
